pharmacophore_hint: Tryptamine core with extended indole — needs non-Abelian braiding realized via chiral macrocyclic cage

preferred_disconnections: bidirectional coupling — two reactive handles needed

predicted_scaffold: Bridged bicyclic with crossing point — tropane-like or morphinan-like

ch3mpiler_retrosynthetic.target_type: ⟨𐑦 · 𐑥 · 𐑾 · 𐑹 · 𐑐 · 𐑧 · 𐑲 · 𐑠 · ⊙ · 𐑫 · 𐑳 · 𐑟⟩

preferred_disconnections: bidirectional coupling — two reactive handles needed

starting_materials: Chiral pool starting material (terpene or amino acid)

key_bond_formations.description: Linear synthesis with ordered bond formation

protecting_groups: Same protecting group on both handles (bidirectional)
ch3mpiler_retrosynthetic.critical_step: Template-directed catenane formation — the mechanical bond closure

key_challenges: Mechanical bond formation — template design critical
Atropisomer separation — may require chiral HPLC
Frobenius-special symmetry — scaffold must survive µ∘δ self-check
